name: relayapi
description: Post to 21 platforms via a single unified API. Manage accounts, upload media, schedule posts, and track analytics through RelayAPI.

RELAYAPI_API_KEY.title: RelayAPI API Key
RELAYAPI_API_KEY.description: Your RelayAPI API key (starts with rlay_live_ or rlay_test_). Get one at https://relayapi.dev/app or via the dashboard.
